calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent/Plaintiff, Paul Baran is present.
Attorney, Shauna L. Matlin representing the Respondent/Plaintiff.

Appellant/Defendant, Charles Schober is present.

This matter comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo hearing. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Charles Schober testifies on his own behalf. No new evidence is marked or retained.

Paul Baran, Shauna L. Matlin and witness testify on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff. No new evidence marked or retained.

After considering all testimony and evidence, the Court rules as follows:

Judgment is ordered in favor of the Respondent, Paul Baron, and against Appellant, Charles Schober, in the amount of $3,864. principal, $125. costs and $0. interest.

Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 514.
